allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const files=fs.readdirSync\('data'\).filter\(f=>f.startsWith\('transtu'\)&&f.endsWith\('.json'\)\); let totalStations=0,totalRoutes=0,dups=[]; const seenStationIds={}; const seenRouteIds={}; for\(const f of files\){ const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('data/'+f,'utf8'\)\); for\(const s of d.stations||[]\){ if\(seenStationIds[s.id]\) dups.push\('STATION DUP in '+f+': '+s.id\); seenStationIds[s.id]=f; totalStations++; } for\(const r of d.routes||[]\){ if\(seenRouteIds[r.id]\) dups.push\('ROUTE DUP in '+f+': '+r.id\); seenRouteIds[r.id]=f; totalRoutes++; } } console.log\('Total stations across all files:',totalStations\); console.log\('Total routes across all files:',totalRoutes\); console.log\('Duplicates found:',dups.length\); dups.forEach\(d=>console.log\(' ',d\)\);")
